ownerOverrides: High-revenue SKUs continue selling while public copy and buyer flow are cleaned.
B2B is inbound/supporting only unless later chosen.
Airtable is frozen/read-only as legacy evidence; Supabase/dashboard is the active operating system for new work.
Supabase is read-only by default for Codex/agents; writes require explicit Pafi approval and must be visibly marked as Pafi-authorized.

Codex/Pafi-agent Supabase writes must run inside a transaction that first sets local app.actor='Pafi', then applies the Pafi-authorized mutation; if the client cannot set actor in the same transaction, the write is blocked until a SQL/RPC wrapper exists.
Narcis website work is consolidated into one Website Compliance task and is waiting for lawyer opinion; no new site modifications should be executed until counsel gives boundaries.
AOD9604 correction split 2026-07-01: website strength issue is completed; label/new-supplier issue is still open.

Ownership update 2026-06-30: Vic owns RUO compliance, allowed website products, affiliate rules, and online-presence rules; Narcis owns tech creation/admin including Hermes Telegram stock management and peptides/supplements protocol agents; Pafi owns products, SKUs, budgeting, and sales workflow.

Chapter model 2026-06-30: Compliance & Online Presence (Vic); Tech/Admin & AI Agents (Narcis); Products, SKUs & Budgeting (Pafi); Purchasing & Logistics (Pafi lead, Vic compliance, Narcis admin); Sales & Marketing (Pafi sales workflow, Vic rules/online presence, Narcis/Dan execution).
Sultan entering as a new owner requires a funds-input/ownership audit before owner settlement, reserve, cap-table, or budget numbers are treated as final.

tasks.title: Website Compliance
tasks.description: Single consolidated website compliance task for PeptraLabs .com/.ro. No new website modifications should be executed until the lawyer opinion arrives and gives the allowed copy/flow boundaries. Prepare only the correction map and evidence while waiting. Corrections to prepare: affiliate/program pages must remove or pause public commission, override, sub-affiliate, influencer recruitment, passive-income, weekly crypto payout, and earnings-calculator claims unless counsel approves a compliant private policy; peptide calculator and reconstitution/dosing flows must stay gated or removed from public access; high-revenue/high-risk SKU pages continue selling only under the lawyer-approved RUO copy model and must remove treatment, healing, repair, fat-loss, human-use, injection, protocol, dosing, medical-benefit, and before/after style claims; checkout must keep intended-use acknowledgement and rejection/manual-review logic aligned with counsel; CTAs, promo strips, discount language, and support copy must avoid medical-use or aggressive commerce framing; visible page copy, meta titles/descriptions, FAQ schema, JSON-LD, llms.txt, llms-full.txt, AI snippets, and Romanian pages must all match the same approved RUO model; COA/report states must be consistent across product pages, lab-report archive, schema, support macros, and LLM files, using clear states such as verified report, supplier COA, independent COA, no public COA, failed, or not applicable; accessories must remain separated from peptide compliance language and must not imply dosing, injection, sterility, or cold-chain proof beyond evidence. Vic now owns compliance decisions for allowed products on the website, affiliate rules, and online presence; Narcis implements approved technical/site changes; Pafi reviews product/SKU and sales implications.
tasks.acceptance: Blocked until lawyer opinion is received. Before that, Narcis/Pafi may prepare URL-by-URL notes only. After counsel opinion arrives, apply only lawyer-approved changes, record changed URLs and screenshots, keep P0-002 calculator/reconstitution gate and P0-004 checkout acknowledgement as completed controls, and run a post-change scan confirming no banned affiliate/calculator/high-risk medical or passive-income claims remain across .com, .ro, schema, LLM files, checkout, support text, and promo surfaces. Vic signs off the allowed-product/compliance rule before Narcis implements site or online-presence changes.
completedControlsPreserved: P0-002 calculator/reconstitution public gating marked done by Pafi on 2026-06-24
P0-004 checkout intended-use acknowledgement marked done by Pafi on 2026-06-24

This is a factual strength correction, not a lawyer-gated copy rewrite.

tasks.title: Build dummy website-paid order handoff and location notification flow
tasks.description: Narcis builds/tests a dummy paid website-order flow from order paid -> location decision -> notification -> local handoff -> evidence record -> stock movement. The notification must route based on customer delivery location: Ibiza orders notify the Ibiza/local handoff channel; Bulgaria/Bucharest/other warehouse-flow orders notify the Bulgaria/central logistics channel. Include order ID, customer location, product/SKU, paid status, delivery/handoff route, responsible person, required proof, and no medical/product-advice text.
tasks.acceptance: A dummy paid order can be processed without real collaborator activation. The correct Ibiza vs Bulgaria/central notification is selected from customer location, the handoff recipient sees only operational details, stock/evidence records are created or drafted, and the flow can be repeated safely before real use.

tasks.title: Build read-only/draft-first AI agent suite
tasks.description: Build AI helpers that can read the dashboard/Supabase/project context and draft actions or reports, but cannot change records by themselves. Examples: Daily Ops summary, Stock check, Finance check, Compliance check, Procurement draft, Accessories check, Ibiza Network update, and Weekly Business Reporter. Narcis owns tech creation/admin for the agent suite, including stock-management and peptide/supplement protocol workflows; agents remain read-only/draft-first unless explicitly Pafi-authorized.

Any proposed write, payment change, stock movement, public copy change, order change, or message send must become a draft and wait for explicit approval ID/idempotency key before execution. Approved Supabase writes by Codex/Pafi agents must set local app.actor='Pafi' in the same write transaction.

tasks.title: Audit Sultan owner funds input and ownership basis
tasks.source: Pafi instruction 2026-07-01: Sultan coming in as new owner; reconcile funds input
tasks.description: Create a controlled owner-onboarding audit for Sultan before treating him as a finalized new owner. Reconcile every Sultan funds input against primary evidence: sender, receiver, account/wallet/Zen/bank path, date, native currency, FX policy if converted, amount, purpose, ownership basis, whether it is capital contribution, shareholder loan, owner receivable offset, inventory funding, operating reserve, or other treatment, and whether any funds have already been spent or reserved. Do not update cap table, owner settlement, budget reserve, or P&L numbers from memory only.
tasks.acceptance: Sultan has a funds-input ledger with source evidence links, transaction dates, native currency, FX rule, cash custody target, classification, ownership terms/% or pending terms, impact on owner settlement/reserve/cap table, and unresolved questions. Control matrix rows are marked for evidence register, cash/Zen/bank/crypto, treasury/custodian target, owner investment/capital return, receivable/payable, budget reserve, exceptions, and published outputs. No Supabase write occurs unless explicitly Pafi-authorized with performed_by=API/Pafi agent and app.actor=Pafi transaction guardrail.
tasks.colourReason: Sultan owner/funds audit added from Pafi instruction; reconciliation can start, but owner status and numbers remain pending evidence.
colourEvidence: Pafi instruction 2026-07-01: add audit for Sultan as new owner and reconcile funds input
tasks.plainExplanationRo: Audit nou pentru Sultan: înainte să fie tratat ca owner final, trebuie reconciliate toate fondurile intrate de la el cu dovezi, valută, dată, cont/wallet, clasificare capital/loan/rezervă și impact pe settlement/cap table/buget. Fără cifre finale din memorie.

tasks.title: Build discount, referral, affiliate, and Staff-class engine
tasks.description: Implement the approved discount/referral/affiliate engine structure: affiliate profiles, discount codes, customer discount assignments, product discount policies, order discount lines, affiliate order attribution, affiliate commission lines, and Staff class. Vic owns rules/compliance; Pafi owns sales economics; Narcis owns tech/admin implementation.
tasks.acceptance: Engine is built or implementation-ready with ex-VAT/ex-transport commission basis, no stacking by default, product-line margin gate, 20% default pool/30% ceiling, partial-refund reversal, legacy high-discount review, and no activation before Vic compliance signoff.
tasks.colourReason: Pricing/discount-engine plan is completed and handed to Narcis; build implementation and Vic compliance signoff remain pending before activation.
colourEvidence: Pafi instruction 2026-07-01: new pricing structure completed according to best practices and sent to Narcis

tasks.title: Resolve protocol blockers for Libido and Cognition stacks
tasks.description: Resolve missing protocol blockers: Libido is blocked by missing PT-141 final protocol, and Cognition is blocked by missing Selank final protocol. Keep protocol economics separate from customer-use advice.
tasks.acceptance: PT-141 and Selank have final approved protocol-economics rows or remain explicitly blocked. Libido and Cognition stack statuses are updated accordingly, with Vic compliance review and Narcis protocol-agent/admin support.

tasks.title: Backfill structured Supabase transaction references plan
tasks.source: Supabase transaction reference audit 2026-06-28 / chapter reorg 2026-06-30
tasks.description: Create a safe backfill plan for 118/534 transaction-like Supabase rows missing structured references across orders, customer_payments, expenses, restocks, stock_movements, and treasury_transfers. This is a plan first; writes remain Pafi-authorized only.
tasks.acceptance: Backfill plan maps each missing-reference table to reference source, proposed field, evidence link, and write authorization requirement. No write occurs without explicit Pafi authorization, performed_by=API/Pafi agent marking, and set local app.actor='Pafi' in the same write transaction.
tasks.plainExplanationRo: Planul de backfill trebuie să includă și regula nouă de audit: pentru write-uri Codex/Pafi se setează set local app.actor='Pafi' în aceeași tranzacție. Fără asta, nu se face write direct.
